title: Carver
description: An Upgrade to the Stonecutter! Or should I say... the Carver?
body:
![Carver Title Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec3011c313e97d796d66f86c6f0ee4d68a8f6718_0.webp) ### Welcome to an upgrade of the Stonecutter! The **Carver** adds many additional recipes to one singular block, the Stonecutter! You can now carve **Ladders** from **Planks**, **Amethyst Shards** from **Amethyst Blocks**, **Raw Gold** from **Gold Ore**, and so on.
### The same block?! The **Carver** block, despite it's new name, is actually still the stonecutter you all know! No need to craft a new workbench, just whip up a Carver from the stonecutting recipe, and embrace the familiar UI while you craft that cobblestone from... stone bricks? ### Vanilla-Friendly The Carver mod aims to **reduce** grinding by allowing **more** blocks to be crafted efficiently in the upgraded Stonecutter! While the Carver adds new recipes to the Stonecutter (now called the _**Carver**_. Ooooh!), it still preserves the feel of minecraft by **not** adding any new job blocks. ### Recipes Here are a few recipes to show how the Carver works: | Item | ➜ | Result | |:---------------------------|----~~~~|:--------------------------| | **_[1x]_** Any Wood Planks | ➜ | **_[4x]_** Sticks | | **_[1x]_** Amethyst Block | ➜ | **_[4x]_** Amethyst Shard | | **_[1x]_** Any Wool | ➜ | **_[4x]_** String | | **_[1x]_** Iron Ore | ➜ | **_[2x]_** Raw Iron | | **_[1x]_** Wood Planks | ➜ | **_[1x]_** Crafting Table | And much more!
